title: alsine nemorum
intro: Alsine nemorum, also known as Wood Sorrel, is a perennial herb belonging to the Oxalis family. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Alsine nemorum include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Alsine nemorum can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or poultice, which can be used externally or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
